metadata.description: Official Knowledge Base for Thorx AI Support Assistant - Dual Engine Halal Ad-Tech Platform

en: Hello {name}! Welcome to THORX. I'm your AI assistant, here to explain our Halal earning model where you convert attention into currency. How can I assist you today?

Hi {name}! Welcome to the THORX community. I can help you understand how to earn by watching video ads (Engine A), completing CPE tasks (Engine B), and building your team. What would you like to know?
Greetings {name}! I'm here to support your earning journey on THORX. Whether it's about the AI Web Panel, Daily Tasks, or the dual-requirement ranking system, feel free to ask!
ur: Assalam o Alaikum {name}! THORX mein khushamdeed. Main aapka AI assistant hoon aur hamare Halal earning model ke baare mein batane ke liye yahan hoon. Aaj main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon?
Hello {name}! THORX community mein swagat hai. Main aapko bata sakta hoon ke kaise video ads (Engine A) dekh kar aur CPE tasks (Engine B) poore kar ke kamaya ja sakta ہے۔ Aap kya jaanna chahenge?
Salam {name}! Main THORX par aapki earning journey mein madad ke liye hoon. Chahe AI Web Panel ho, Daily Tasks hon ya naya ranking system, befikr hokar poochein!

en: Goodbye {name}! Thank you for being part of our transparent earning ecosystem. Stay attentive and keep earning!
Take care {name}! I'm available 24/7 if you need legal or task clarifications. See you next time!
Bye {name}! Wishing you success on THORX. Remember, real attention brings real rewards. Allah Hafiz!
ur: Allah Hafiz {name}! Hamare transparent earning ecosystem ka hissa banne ka shukriya. Tawajjo rakhein aur kamate rahein!
Apna khayal rakhein {name}! Main 24/7 available hoon agar koi sawal ho. Phir milenge!
Khuda Hafiz {name}! THORX par kamyabi ki dua. Yaad rakhein, asli tawajjo hi asli inaam lati hai. Allah Hafiz!

en: THORX is an advanced "Attention-as-a-Service" platform designed for Pakistanis. We operate two main earning engines: Engine A (VAST Video Ads Waterfall) and Engine B (High-profit CPE Offerwall). You earn Halal income by giving verified human attention to these tasks via our AI Web Panel tracker.

{name}, THORX offers a transparent ecosystem for Pakistanis to earn together. Unlike other platforms, we require **active engagement** for 15+ seconds on advertiser landing pages. Our AI verifies this attention to generate legimate revenue. We support payouts via JazzCash and EasyPaisa.

THORX is where verified attention meets opportunity. We filter out bots and guarantee our advertisers human traffic, allowing us to pay you premium rates in PKR. We also feature a highly profitable 2-level referral system (15% L1, 7.5% L2) triggered upon withdrawals.
ur: THORX ek advanced "Attention-as-a-Service" platform hai. Hum do blocks chalate hain: Engine A (Video Ads) aur Engine B (CPE Offers). Aap hamare AI Web Panel ke zariye in tasks ko tawajjo de kar Halal aamdani kamate hain.

{name}, THORX Pakistanion ke liye ek shafaf ecosystem hai. Yahan aapko advertiser ke page par 15+ seconds ki **active engagement** deni hoti hai jo hamara AI verify karta hai, taake kamai Halal aur jaiz ho. Hum JazzCash aur EasyPaisa support karte hain.

THORX wo jagah hai jahan tawajjo se mauqa milta hai. Hum bots ko rokte hain aur advertisers ko human traffic ki guarantee dete hain, is liye aapko PKR mein behtar rate milta hai. Sath hi 2-level referral system (15% L1, 7.5% L2) bhi mojood hai.

en: Yes, {name}, THORX operates within a **Halal-based earning model**. We strictly curate our video advertisements and CPE offers to ensure NO haram or inappropriate material is promoted.

We take this seriously. THORX ensures that: 1) All ad content covers strict guidelines, and 2) Income is generated through active user engagement (real work inside our AI Web Panel), not interest or gambling.
Transparency is key to our Halal model. You satisfy advertisers by giving genuine attention to their products (visiting pages for ~15 seconds). This exchange of value makes the earning legitimate.
ur: Ji haan, {name}, THORX ek **Halal-based earning model** par chalta hai. Hum sakhti se video advertisements aur CPE offers check karte hain taake koi haram ya namunasib mawad promote na ho.

Hum is baat ko sanjeedgi se lete hain. THORX yakeeni banata hai ke aamdani active engagement (AI Web Panel mein asli kaam) se aaye, sood ya juway se nahi. Bina dihan diye auto-functioning haram samjhi jati hai.
Hamare Halal model ki bunyad shafafiyat hai. Aap advertisers ko unki products par asli tawajjo de kar (~15 seconds ruk kar) value dete hain. Yeh len-den kamai ko legitimate banata hai.

en:
Earning on THORX requires active participation, {name}. You can earn through two main systems:
1. **Engine A (Video Ads)**: Watch short videos fully and click the 'ENTER' button to verify your presence.
2. **Engine B (CPE Offerwall)**: Complete high-paying engagement tasks sourced from global networks.
Both methods require passing the 15-second tracking test inside our **AI Web Panel**.

To earn, go to the Work section. You must actively engage with either video ads or CPE offers. Our AI Web Panel tracks your scrolling and reading behavior to ensure you are paying attention. If you pass the 15-second tracking rule, your balance is credited instantly.
ur:
THORX par kamane ke liye active rehna zaroori hai, {name}. Kamai ke do tareeqay hain:
1. **Engine A (Video Ads)**: Pura video dekhein aur human presence verify karne ke liye 'ENTER' button dabayein.
2. **Engine B (CPE Offers)**: Globally sourced high-paying engagement tasks poore karein.
Dono mein kamyabi ke liye hamare **AI Web Panel** ka 15-second tracking test pass karna lazmi hai.

Kamane ke liye Work section mein jayen. Aapko video ads ya CPE offers par active rehna hoga. Hamara AI Web Panel aapki scrolling check karta hai. Agar aap 15-second ka test pass karte hain, toh aapki balance fauran badh jati hai.

en: **Engine A** is our VAST Video Waterfall system. It uses 4 custom, lightning-fast video players connected to premium ad networks. If one network is empty, the next loads in milliseconds! To prevent bot bans, videos do NOT automatically redirect. You must click the massive 'ENTER' button at the end to claim your reward.
ur: **Engine A** hamara VAST Video Waterfall system hai. Badi ad networks se connect hokar yeh 4 tez players chalata hai. Bot ban se bachne ke liye, video khatam hone par aapko khud screen par anay wale bade 'ENTER' button par click karna hota hai apna inam lene ke liye.

en: **Engine B** is our high-profit Cost-Per-Engagement (CPE) Offerwall. It pulls tasks from top CPA networks. We use Smart-Cap logic: if an offer needs 1,000 users, we temporarily reserve your slot when you click it. Once the cap hits zero, the offer vanishes so no user wastes their time on full campaigns.
ur: **Engine B** ek high-paying Cost-Per-Engagement (CPE) Offerwall hai jahan hum top CPA networks se tasks layte hain. Ismein Smart-Cap logic use hoti hai – agar offer poori hojaye toh wo screen se ghaib ho jati hai taake kisi ka waqt zaya na ho.

en: **The THORX AI Web Panel** is our secret sauce. When you click an ad or offer, you land in our custom browser panel. You must stay for at least 15 seconds. The AI tracks real human behavior like scrolling and touch events to guarantee zero bot traffic. If you pass, you get paid instantly!
ur: **THORX AI Web Panel** hamara tracker hai. Jab aap kisi ad par click karte hain toh aap is panel mein jate hain jahan aapko kam az kam 15 seconds rukna hota hai. AI aapki scrolling aur touch movement judge karta hai bot traffic rokne ke liye. Agar pass hue, toh paisay fauran account mein!

en:
Our Multi-Level Referral System pays 15% (Level 1) and 7.5% (Level 2). 
**Important**: Commission is credited ONLY when your referral requests a payout. This ensures maximum safety, value, and cash flow for the ecosystem.

Grow your team to earn passive income! You earn 15% from direct referrals and 7.5% from indirect. To ensure long-term stability, we distribute this commission at the moment your team members successfully withdraw, directly from our platform margin.
ur:
Hamara Multi-Level Referral System aapko Level 1 par 15% aur Level 2 par 7.5% deta hai.
**Zaroori**: Commission sirf tab credit hoti hai jab aapka referral payout request (JazzCash/Easypaisa) karta hai, jo system ko safe rakhta hai.
Passive income ke liye team banayein! Direct referrals se 15% aur unke referrals se 7.5%. Sustainability ke liye, yeh commissions unke withdrawal ke waqt process hoti hain.

en: Daily Tasks act as our **Payout Gatekeeper**. Your payout page is mathematically LOCKED by the system until your Daily Mandatory Tasks are complete. These tasks ensure constant platform engagement and usually include watching Video Ads (Engine A), completing CPE Offers (Engine B), and verifying codes.
ur: Daily Tasks hamara **Payout Gatekeeper** hain. Jab tak aap apne aaj kay Mandatory Tasks poore nahi karte, aapka withdrawal page mathematically LOCKED rehta hai. In tasks mein Engine A aur Engine B kay zariye ads dekhna aur codes dalna shamil ho sakta hai.

en:
THORX uses a **Dual-Requirement Ranking System**. You must hit BOTH referral bounds and personal earning bounds to upgrade. Upgrading unlocks better withdrawal priorities (1 to 5)!
1. **Useless**: Priority 5.
2. **Worker**: 5 Invites AND 2,500 PKR earned (Priority 4).
3. **Soldier**: 10 Invites AND 5,000 PKR earned (Priority 3).
4. **Captain**: 15 Invites AND 10,000 PKR earned (Priority 2).
5. **General**: 25 Invites AND 25,000 PKR earned (Priority 1 = Fastest payouts).
ur:
THORX ka **Dual-Requirement Ranking System** fake referrals rokta hai. Rank barhane kay liye invites AUR earnings donon zaroori hain:
1. **Useless**: Priority 5.
2. **Worker**: 5 Invites AUR 2,500 PKR kamana zaruri (Priority 4).
3. **Soldier**: 10 Invites AUR 5,000 PKR (Priority 3).
4. **Captain**: 15 Invites AUR 10,000 PKR (Priority 2).
5. **General**: 25 Invites AUR 25,000 PKR (Priority 1 = Sab se tez withdrawals).

en:
You can request withdrawals via **JazzCash**, **EasyPaisa**, or **Bank Transfer**. 
**Crucial Rule**: The withdrawal page is securely locked until you complete your assigned Daily Tasks for the day. High-ranking users (Generals, Captains) get their payouts processed first due to priority.
ur:
Aap **JazzCash**, **EasyPaisa**, ya **Bank Transfer** se payout le saktay hain. 
**Crucial Rule**: Payout page bilkul LOCK rehta hai jab tak aaj kay Daily Tasks poore na hon. Oonchay rank walay users (General/Captain) ki payment pehlay process hoti hai priority rules kay mutabiq.

en: **Warning**: Auto-functioning bots or scripts are totally banned and will automatically fail the AI Web Panel 15-second tracking test. Any attempt to use bots will result in a permanent shadow-ban from CPE offers.
ur: **Warning**: Auto-functioning bots aur scripts strictly sakhti say manna hain. Hamara AI Web Panel 15-second tracking test bots ko pakkar lega aur apka account block hojaye ga CPE offers kay liye.

en: I didn't quite catch that, {name}. I can help with Earning rules, Engine A, Engine B, or the Payout lock systems.
I'm not sure, but remember: THORX is about converting human attention to currency. Ask me about the 'AI Web Panel' or 'How to rank up'!
ur: Maine sahi se samjha nahi, {name}. Kya aap dubara pooch sakte hain? Main Engine A, Engine B, ya Payout locks mein madad kar sakta hoon.
Mujhe yakeen nahi, lekin yaad rakhein: THORX mein human attention paison mein tabdeel hoti hai. Mujhse 'AI Web Panel' ya 'Rank UP kaise karein' poochein!
